metadata.name: riso-template
metadata.description: Riso is a component-first, polyglot Copier template supporting Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Go. Each component (CLI, API, MCP, Docs, SaaS) can be independently configured with its own language choice, enabling flexible combinations like Rust CLI + Python API + Fumadocs. Features modular SaaS scaffolding with opt-in auth, billing, and infrastructure layers.

prompts.help:
Include document processing MCP servers?
(docling for PDF/DOCX, repomix for repo context)

Include search MCP servers (requires API keys)?
(brave-search, tavily, context7 - keys via env vars)

Include thinking/reasoning MCP servers?
(sequential-thinking, structured-thinking, cascade-thinking, etc.)

Include utility MCP servers?
(memory persistence)

Include web MCP servers?
(fetch, fetcher, playwright, deepwiki)

Enable AI coding tools configuration?
Generates config files for Claude Code, Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI,
Cursor CLI, Gemini CLI, Amazon Q CLI, and OpenCode.
All tools share AGENTS.md as the single source of truth.

Select additional API features (comma-separated):
- graphql: GraphQL endpoint (Strawberry/Apollo/async-graphql)
- websocket: WebSocket real-time communication
- openapi: OpenAPI documentation generation

Select API implementation language(s) - multiselect supported for monorepo:
- python: FastAPI with Pydantic v2
- node: Fastify with TypeScript
- rust: Actix-web with Serde
- go: Go with selectable framework (Gin, Fiber, Echo, Chi)
Enable REST/HTTP API scaffolding?
Enable changelog generation and release management?

Select CI/CD platform:
- github-actions: GitHub Actions with matrix builds, caching, artifacts
- gitlab-ci: GitLab CI with parallel.matrix, Docker-in-Docker, GitLab Pages
- circleci: CircleCI 2.1 with orbs, workspaces, parallelism
- none: Skip CI configuration

Select CLI implementation language(s) - multiselect supported for monorepo:
- python: Typer with Rich console output
- rust: Clap with colored output
- typescript: Commander.js with Chalk
- go: Cobra v1.10 with slog logging
Enable CLI application scaffolding?
Enable code generation and scaffolding tools?

Select desktop features (comma-separated):
- auto_updater: Auto-update via GitHub Releases
- tray_icon: System tray icon support
- custom_titlebar: Frameless window with custom title bar

Select desktop framework:
- electron-vite: Electron 34.x with electron-vite for optimal dev experience
- electron-forge: Electron Forge for alternative build setup
- tauri: Rust-based lightweight alternative to Electron
Enable native desktop application scaffolding?

Select target platforms (comma-separated):
- mac: macOS (x64 and ARM64)
- windows: Windows (x64 and ARM64)
- linux: Linux (AppImage, deb, rpm)

Select documentation framework:
- fumadocs: Next.js-based, modern UI, MDX
- sphinx-shibuya: Python Sphinx with Shibuya theme
- docusaurus: React-based, versioning, blog
- mkdocs: Python-based, Material theme
Enable documentation site scaffolding?

Select analytics for Docusaurus:
- none: No analytics
- posthog: Product analytics + session replay
- google: Google Analytics 4
- matomo: Privacy-focused, self-hosted option

Enable announcement bar at top of site?
Ideal for new releases, events, or important notices.

Enable autolinked headings?
Adds clickable anchor links to all headings.

Enable back-to-top button?
Floating button for quick scroll to page top.

Enable blog functionality?
Scaffolds blog directory with example posts and RSS/Atom feeds.

Enable changelog integration?
Include CHANGELOG.md as documentation page.

Enable tabbed code blocks plugin?
Group code samples by language with synchronized tab selection.

Enable comments on documentation pages?
- giscus: GitHub Discussions-powered comments (recommended)
- none: No comments

Enable debug plugin in development?
Adds /__docusaurus/debug route for inspecting site data.

Enable "Edit this page" links?
Links to source file on GitHub for community contributions.

Enable emoji shortcode support?
Converts :smile: to 😄 and other emoji shortcodes.

Enable Docusaurus Faster optimizations?
Uses Rspack bundler, SWC, and LightningCSS for 2-4x faster builds.

Enable "Was this page helpful?" feedback widget?
Collects reader feedback on documentation quality.

Enable GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM)?
Adds tables, strikethrough, task lists, and autolink literals.

Enable GitHub reference autolinking?
Autolinks #issues, @mentions, and commit SHAs to GitHub.

Enable internationalization (i18n) support?
Scaffolds locale config and translation workflow.

Enable ideal-image plugin?
Responsive images with lazy loading and low-quality placeholders.

Enable image zoom plugin?
Medium-style click-to-zoom for documentation images.

Enable live code playground?
Interactive React code blocks that users can edit and run in the browser.

Enable llms.txt plugin for AI-ready documentation?
Generates concatenated docs for LLM consumption and RAG pipelines.

Enable KaTeX math equation support?
Render LaTeX math with $...$ (inline) and $$...$$ (block) syntax.

Enable Mermaid diagram support?
Render flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, Gantt charts directly in markdown.

Enable OpenAPI documentation integration?
Auto-generates API reference from OpenAPI specs.

Enable Progressive Web App (PWA) support?
Offline capability, app installation, and service worker caching.

Show estimated reading time on docs/blog?
Displays "X min read" based on word count.

Enable client-side redirects plugin?
Handle URL changes and old page preservation gracefully.

Select search provider for Docusaurus:
- local: Offline full-text search (docusaurus-search-local)
- algolia: Hosted DocSearch, best UX, requires API key
- typesense: Self-hosted, privacy-focused search
- none: No search integration

Show last updated time on docs?
Displays git-based "Last updated" timestamp and author on each page.

Enable sitemap.xml generation?
Improves search engine discoverability and crawling.

Enable JSON-LD structured data for SEO?
Adds schema.org Organization, WebSite, and Article markup for rich results.

Select theming approach:
- classic: Default Infima CSS framework
- tailwind: Tailwind CSS v4 + utility-first styling

Enable documentation versioning?
Allows maintaining multiple doc versions (v1, v2, etc.)

Embedding provider for vector database:
- openai: OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002 or text-embedding-3
- cohere: Cohere embed-english-v3.0 or embed-multilingual-v3.0

Enable AI-powered search dialog?
Scaffolds chat interface with Vercel AI SDK.
Enable announcement banner at top of docs?

Enable blog/changelog section?
Uses MDX content collection for posts.

Select syntax highlighting theme for code blocks:
- github: GitHub light/dark (default)
- catppuccin: Catppuccin latte/mocha
- dracula: Dracula theme
- nord: Nord theme
- one: One light/dark
Show "Edit on GitHub" links on documentation pages?
Enable "Was this helpful?" feedback widget on pages?
Enable internationalization support?
Enable medium-style image zoom on click?
Show "Last updated" timestamp from git history?

Enable llms.txt AI integration?
Generates AI-friendly documentation endpoints:
- /llms.txt (summary)
- /llms-full.txt (complete docs)
- /*.mdx (per-page markdown)

Enable KaTeX math equations in Markdown?
Supports inline ($) and block ($$) LaTeX.

Enable Mermaid diagrams in Markdown?
Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, etc.

Enable OpenAPI documentation integration?
Auto-generates interactive API reference from specs.

Select search provider for Fumadocs:
- orama: Built-in free search (default, self-hosted)
- algolia: Hosted DocSearch, enterprise-grade
- orama-cloud: Orama Cloud SDK for scaling
- none: No search integration

Select sidebar style:
- default: Built-in Fumadocs sidebar
- shadcn: Shadcn UI sidebar component

Select theming approach:
- default: Fumadocs UI with neutral preset
- ocean: Blue-toned ocean preset
- purple: Purple accent preset
- custom: Custom CSS variables (scaffold only)

Table of contents heading depth (2-6):
- 2: H2 headings only
- 3: H2-H3 headings (default)
- 4: H2-H4 headings

prompts.when: {{ docs_module == 'enabled' and docs_framework == 'fumadocs' and api_module == 'enabled' and 'node' in api_languages }}
prompts.help:
Enable Twoslash for TypeScript code blocks?
Shows inline type hints, errors, and completions.

prompts.when: {{ docs_module == 'enabled' and docs_framework == 'fumadocs' and api_module == 'enabled' and 'node' in api_languages }}
prompts.help:
Enable TypeDoc SDK documentation?
Generates TypeScript API docs from source.

Select Go HTTP framework:
- gin: Gin v1.11 - Most popular, great performance, rich middleware
- fiber: Fiber v2.52 - Express-inspired, fastest, low memory
- echo: Echo v4.13 - Minimalist, great docs, built-in middleware
- chi: Chi v5.2 - Lightweight, stdlib-compatible, idiomatic
Select Go version (1.24 stable, 1.26 releasing Feb 2026)
Include admin dashboard scaffolding (user management, subscriptions, audit logs)
Include PostgreSQL and Redis services in docker-compose?
Include example tools (echo, timestamp, fetch)?

Select MCP server implementation language(s) - multiselect supported for monorepo:
- python: FastMCP v2 with Pydantic
- typescript: FastMCP (Node.js) with Zod
- rust: Rust SDK (rmcp)
- go: Official MCP Go SDK with slog logging
Enable MCP (Model Context Protocol) server scaffolding?

Select default transport protocol:
- stdio: Standard I/O (default, best for local agents)
- sse: Server-Sent Events (for web clients)
- http: HTTP streaming
Choose the repository layout
Human friendly project name
Python versions to test in CI matrix
Select baseline quality suite profile

Include two-factor authentication (2FA) scaffolding? Generates:
- TOTP setup flow (Google Authenticator, Authy compatible)
- Backup codes generation and storage
- 2FA enforcement settings per organization
- Recovery flow
Note: Clerk has built-in 2FA. This adds custom 2FA for Auth.js.

Include admin dashboard scaffolding? Generates:
- Admin-only routes with role-based authentication
- User management (list, search, view details, suspend accounts)
- Organization management (for B2B) or subscription overview (for B2C)
- User impersonation for debugging customer issues
- Basic metrics dashboard (signups, active users, revenue)

Select AI provider:
- OpenAI: GPT-4o/GPT-5, function calling
- Anthropic: Claude 4.x, longer context windows
AI integration level (full includes RAG with pgvector)

Select analytics platform:
- PostHog: Product OS (analytics + flags + replay)
- Amplitude: Enterprise analytics, cohorts

Select API access model for your SaaS:
- Public API: Full API key management with user-facing UI, rate limiting dashboard,
  usage tracking, and auto-generated API documentation. Best for developer platforms.
- Internal Only: API routes exist but for internal use only. No API key management UI.
  Users interact via web interface only.

Include API documentation generation? Generates:
- OpenAPI 3.1 schema from route handlers
- Swagger UI at /api/docs
- TypeScript client generation script
- API versioning support

Enable SaaS Application features?
Requires saas_billing_module. Adds background jobs, email, analytics, AI.

Enable SaaS Authentication layer?
Requires saas_infra_module. Sets up user auth, sessions, and roles.

Select authentication provider:
- Clerk: Hosted auth, built-in UI, organizations, passkeys
- Auth.js: Self-hosted, open-source, full control
- Lucia: Type-safe sessions, any database, full control

Enable SaaS Billing layer?
Requires saas_auth_module. Sets up subscriptions, payments, invoices.

Select billing provider:
- Stripe: Full control, usage metering, widest ecosystem
- Paddle: Merchant of Record, automatic tax/VAT
- LemonSqueezy: MoR alternative, indie-hacker friendly

Include MDX blog scaffolding? Generates:
- Blog listing page
- Individual post pages with MDX support
- Author profiles
- Categories/tags
- RSS feed
- SEO metadata

Include public changelog page? Generates:
- Changelog listing from MDX files
- Version badges (new, improved, fixed)
- Subscribe to updates
- RSS feed for changelog

Select CI/CD platform:
- GitHub Actions: Native GitHub integration, marketplace actions, deploy to Vercel
- Cloudflare CI: Integrated with Cloudflare Pages/Workers, fast edge deployments
Compliance requirements level

Select database provider:
- Neon: Serverless Postgres, branching, autoscale-to-zero
- Supabase: Postgres + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions

Select email provider:
- Resend: React Email templates, Vercel integration
- Postmark: Industry-leading deliverability

Add enterprise authentication bridge (SSO, SCIM)?
- WorkOS: Enterprise SSO (Okta, Azure AD), SCIM provisioning
- None: Skip enterprise features for now

Select file upload widget:
- UploadThing: Type-safe uploads, built for Next.js, S3-compatible backend.
- React Dropzone: Flexible, bring your own backend, more control.
- None: Manual file input handling.

Select form handling library:
- React Hook Form: Performance-focused, minimal re-renders, Zod integration.
- Conform: Remix-native, progressive enhancement, server validation.
- None: Manual form handling with native React.

Include GDPR compliance tools? Generates:
- Data export endpoint (download all user data as JSON/ZIP)
- Account deletion flow with grace period
- Cookie consent banner
- Privacy preference center
- Data processing records

Select hosting platform:
- Vercel: Native Next.js support, edge functions, preview deployments
- Cloudflare: Global edge network, Pages + Workers, lower egress

Enable internationalization support with next-intl.
Include internationalization (i18n) scaffolding? Generates:
- next-intl (Next.js) or remix-i18next (Remix) configuration
- Default English locale with placeholder translations
- Language switcher component in navigation
- Date, number, and currency formatting utilities
- Translation key extraction setup
Include test data factories (Faker.js integration) for generating realistic test data?
Include seeded database fixtures with example users, organizations, and subscriptions?

Enable SaaS Infrastructure layer?
Sets up: Next.js/Remix runtime, Vercel/Cloudflare hosting, database, ORM.
This is the foundation layer - required before enabling auth or billing.

Select background job system:
- Trigger.dev: Task-centric, AI-optimized, built-in retries
- Inngest: Event-driven workflows, durable execution

Include marketing landing page scaffolding? Generates:
- Hero section with CTA
- Features grid
- Pricing table (connected to billing plans)
- Testimonials section
- FAQ accordion
- Footer with links
Multi-tenancy support level (enterprise adds tenant isolation, SAML scaffolding)

Select notification system scaffolding:
- Both: Real-time in-app notification center + email notifications with preferences.
  Includes notification bell component, WebSocket/SSE delivery, and email digests.
- Email Only: Email notifications only. Simpler architecture, no real-time component.
- None: No notification scaffolding. You'll implement notifications manually.
Enable Datadog for APM (Application Performance Monitoring)?
Enable OpenTelemetry instrumentation for traces and metrics?
Enable Sentry for error tracking?
Enable structured JSON logging with correlation IDs?

Include user onboarding flow scaffolding?
- Wizard: Multi-step guided setup with progress indicator, data collection, and
  completion tracking. Great for complex products requiring initial configuration.
- Checklist: Dashboard checklist with completion tracking and contextual prompts.
  Non-blocking, lets users explore while guiding them to key actions.
- None: No onboarding scaffolding. Users land directly on the dashboard.

Select ORM for database access:
- Prisma: Best TypeScript ergonomics, schema DSL, Prisma Studio
- Drizzle: Lightweight, SQL-like syntax, edge-optimized

Select rate limiting implementation:
- Upstash: Redis-based, serverless, sliding window, great for edge.
- Built-in: In-memory rate limiting (resets on deploy, single-instance only).
- None: No rate limiting (handle at infrastructure level).

Select role-based access control (RBAC) system:
- Basic Roles: Fixed owner/admin/member roles with hardcoded permissions. Simple,
  predictable, covers 80% of use cases. No admin UI needed.
- Custom Permissions: Dynamic permission system with role management UI, granular
  access control, and permission inheritance. Best for enterprise or complex access needs.

Select real-time communication provider:
- Socket.io: Self-hosted, full control, works with any backend.
- Pusher: Industry standard, channels/presence, easy setup, generous free tier.
- Ably: Enterprise-grade, message history, global edge network.
- Supabase Realtime: Integrated with Supabase, Postgres changes, presence.
- None: No real-time features (polling or SSE only).

Select runtime framework:
- Next.js 16: React 19.2, App Router, Turbopack, largest ecosystem
- Remix 2.x: Server-first routes, explicit data loading, forms
Search provider for content indexing

Select file storage provider:
- Cloudflare R2: S3-compatible, zero egress fees, global edge network
- Supabase Storage: Integrated with Supabase platform, RLS policies, image transformations

Select tenancy model for your SaaS application:
- B2B Teams: Organization-centric with team workspaces, seat-based billing, team invites,
  shared resources, and organization switching. Best for collaboration tools, project
  management, and enterprise software.
- B2C Users: User-centric with individual accounts, personal subscriptions, no team
  features. Best for consumer apps, personal productivity tools, and individual SaaS.

Select test suite coverage level:
- Standard: Unit tests + integration tests for all services
- Comprehensive: Standard + E2E tests for critical user flows (signup, billing, dashboard)

Select UI component framework:
- shadcn-ui: Copy-paste components built on Radix, full customization, Tailwind-native.
  Best for: Custom designs, full control over styling.
- Radix Primitives: Unstyled accessible primitives, bring your own styles.
  Best for: Design systems, maximum flexibility.
- Headless UI: Tailwind Labs components, simpler API, good defaults.
  Best for: Quick prototypes, Tailwind-first teams.

Enable user impersonation for admin users? Allows admins to:
- View the app as any user for debugging and support
- Audit trail of all impersonation sessions
- Clear visual indicator when impersonating
Requires saas_admin_dashboard to be enabled.

Include pre-launch waitlist scaffolding? Generates:
- Waitlist landing page with email capture
- Invite code system with limited-use codes
- Referral tracking (who invited whom)
- Admin panel for managing waitlist and sending invites
Best for validating demand before full launch.
Generate shared logic package?

Vector database for AI/RAG features:
- none: No vector database (for non-RAG AI features)
- pinecone: Managed vector database with high performance
- qdrant: Open-source vector database, self-hostable
- weaviate: GraphQL-based vector database with rich semantics
